reference_answer: TK-480 is blocked because the replacement gasket has not arrived.
The warehouse promised an arrival update on 2026-06-06.
No. The safety lockout review does not clear P-17 for operation because the gasket replacement is still pending.
IMG-22 is scheduled for 2026-07-14 in Lab Room C.
IMG-22 excludes chemical flattening because the conservation note says the ink is water-sensitive.
Separate transport is required for folio F-113; it must not be placed in the normal courier tray.
GA-9 assigns one raised bed, Bed 12.
GA-9 is conditional because the group still needs to submit a signed watering schedule.
If the schedule is not submitted by 2026-04-25, Bed 12 returns to the reserve pool.
